description_long: This is a classic wooden chessboard with a square playing surface featuring alternating light and dark squares, bordered by a thick, polished wooden frame. The board is set up for a standard chess game, with two sets of chess pieces: one in a dark brown wood and the other in a light beige wood, each occupying their respective starting positions. The chess pieces are traditionally shaped, including pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings, all crafted with smooth, rounded forms and a glossy finish. The border of the board is wide, flat, and made from a darker wood, providing a sturdy and elegant frame around the playing area. The surface of the board is smooth and reflective, suggesting a high-quality varnish or lacquer. The overall appearance is refined and suitable for both casual and competitive play in public urban spaces such as parks or plazas.
description: A polished wooden chessboard with alternating light and dark squares, bordered by a thick, dark wood frame and set up with two full sets of classic chess pieces. The board and pieces have a smooth, glossy finish and a refined, traditional look.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the side of the dark pieces, showing all pieces in their starting positions with the dark wood border prominently visible.
description_view_1: This view faces the light pieces, highlighting their arrangement and the contrast between the light and dark squares, with the border framing the board.
description_view_2: The board is seen from the side, displaying the profile of both sets of pieces and the alternating square pattern, with the border running along the edge.
description_view_3: The chessboard is viewed from the side of the light pieces, showing their full lineup and the glossy finish of the board and border.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular grid of alternating light and dark wooden squares, each square being perfectly square-shaped and arranged in a classic checkered pattern. The squares are uniform in size and aligned precisely, with no decorative elements or inscriptions within the playing area. The border is a wide, dark wooden frame that contrasts with the lighter and darker squares of the grid.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, flat frame made of dark polished wood, with a smooth, glossy finish. It is unadorned, with no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings, and provides a sturdy and elegant edge around the playing area.
